---
title: "Recusos utilizados"
---

## Recursos

### XXXXXXXX

  

### XXXXXXXXs

[Copernicus Data Space Ecosystem (CDSE)](https://dataspace.copernicus.eu)

### R libraries

[CDSE - Copernicus Data Space Ecosystem API Wrapper](https://zivankaraman.github.io/CDSE/)

```{r}
# install.packages("remotes")

# remotes::install_github("zivankaraman/CDSE")
```
